---
title: "Untitled"
format: scidata-pdf
echo: false
abstract: This is a test abstract.
author:
  - name: Seb Dunnett
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false

if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
p_load(sf,scico,tidyverse,cowplot,terra,units,vapour,giscoR,kableExtra,scales)

ch_basic_files = list.files("..", pattern = "Basic_Critical_Habitat.*\\.tif$", full.names=TRUE)
ch_basic_file = ch_basic_files[which.max(file.info(ch_basic_files)$ctime)]

ch2024_30as = rast(ch_basic_file)

ch2024_areas = expanse(ch2024_30as,unit="km",byValue=TRUE)[,2:3]

```

### Coverage

Thoughts on this sentence? $>=$90

$\geq90$

$\geq$ 90

>=90
